task_description: Fix legend button position, make monster recruit selector a centered popup, fix dual-type monster reserve counting in PlayerPanel/ActionPanel/TemplePanel, and fix Kami phase race condition in online play.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) passes. Vite production build (npm run build) succeeds. No test framework in project. Post-review refactoring addressed stale temple figures migration and reserve computation duplication.
